arts.ttl: Everton record transfer sets Dominic Calvert-Lewin challenge and backs David Moyes decision
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Tony Cottee spoke to ECHO Everton reporter Chris Beesley about the current Blues side after appearing as the latest guest on the Goodison Park: My Home series

arts.ttl: David Moyes explains new staff roles as Everton miss out on 'exceptional' coach
arts.sum: Returning Everton manager David Moyes has detailed the roles of backroom staff Alan Irvine, Leighton Baines and Billy McKinlay

arts.ttl: Who is Donyell Malen and how will he fit in at Villa?
arts.sum: A ferocious second-half Real comeback would ultimately quash any Dortmund hopes of revenge but, in less than five minutes against the European champions, Malen had demonstrated the clinical finishing and penetrative pace which have convinced Aston Villa to sign him for a reported €25 million, plus up to €5m in bonuses. German football expert Matt Ford looks at Aston Villa's latest signing, Donyell Malen, who has joined from Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa sign winger Malen from Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: The 25-year-old is Villa's first signing of the January transfer window after a productive spell in Germany, netting 39 goals and providing 20 assists in 132 appearances. After two years in north London, he transferred to PSV Eindhoven in the summer of 2017, where he contributed 79 goals (55 scored, 24 assists) in 116 appearances.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Aston Villa: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Everton take on Aston Villa in the Premier League on Wednesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Everton job too big an opportunity to turn down - Moyes
arts.sum: David Moyes says rejoining Everton was "too big an opportunity to turn down" after replacing Sean Dyche to become Toffees manager for the second time.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa open talks over signing centre-back from European giant who FLOPPED at fellow Premier League side, playing NO minutes on loan
arts.sum: The 24-year-old has become an important figure for Sevilla and has been called up to the French national team this season, though Didier Deschamps is yet to hand him a cap.

arts.ttl: Everton job too big an opportunity to turn down - Moyes
arts.sum: David Moyes says rejoining Everton was "too big an opportunity to turn down" after replacing Sean Dyche to become Toffees manager for the second time.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery reveals Aston Villa transfer hope over two players and explains wish
arts.sum: Unai Emery can't guarantee Aston Villa will be able to keep both Ollie Watkins and Jhon Duran in their squad in the long-term, but admits it's a "privilege" to coach them. Every Aston Villa supporter should be proud of how we can have strikers like Ollie Watkins and Jhon Duran.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa defender Diego Carlos responds directly to Unai Emery injury claim
arts.sum: Aston Villa defender Diego Carlos has refuted Unai Emery's suggestion that he is injured ahead of Wednesday night's clash against Everton in the Premier League. This has understandably led to confusion about the centre-back's fitness and future at Villa Park after he has been linked with the exit door in recent weeks.
